description: Local harness scorecard for Codex-like SISO architecture capabilities. This is not a live model quality benchmark.

capabilities.description: Workflow accepts GPT/controller allocation plans as objects or JSON text.
Assignments carry durable specialist ids, execution profiles, risk/domain metadata, and aliases.
Native and legacy scoped child records preserve allocation ids and assignment metadata.
Workflow runs required checks, verifier review, feedback re-entry, and exhausted-failure handling.
Worker prompts require changed files, checks, acceptance status, risks, and blockers.
High-risk and multi-domain tasks route through GPT-5.5 controller metadata.
Representative live direct Codex vs SISO benchmark exists.
SISO main runtime matches direct Codex first-class tool/session semantics.
